Our Story

Baked fresh,
every single day

We're a home bakery right here in Ambattur, Chennai. Every batch is made from scratch — real butter, real chocolate, real care. What you pick up today was baked this morning.

No bulk orders sitting on shelves. No artificial flavours. Just brownies the way they were meant to be — dense, fudgy, and made with love for your neighbourhood.

100%
Homemade, fresh daily

How to Order

Ready in hours,
not days

Ordering is simple. Just send us a WhatsApp message or DM on Instagram and your brownies will be ready for same-day pickup right here in Ambattur.

1

Choose your flavour from our menu and quantity you need.

2

DM us on Instagram or WhatsApp with your order details.

3

Pick up your fresh brownies at the agreed time from our home in Ambattur.
